LCOV - code coverage report
Current view: top level - tb/uvm/env - lliu_coverage.sv Coverage Total Hit
Test: LLIU UVM Line Coverage Lines: 93.9 % 114 107
Test Date: 2026-03-23 22:31:29 Functions: - 0 0 

            Line data    Source code
       1              : // lliu_coverage.sv — Functional coverage collector for LLIU
       2              : //
       3              : // Subscribes to AXI4-Stream monitor, parses ITCH Add Order fields,
       4              : // and tracks coverage bins for message type, price range, side, and
       5              : // the price_range × side cross.
       6              : //
       7              : // Note: SV covergroups are not supported by the open-source simulator,
       8              : // so coverage is tracked with explicit counters. A report is printed in
       9              : // report_phase.  The same bin structure mirrors the cocotb functional
      10              : // coverage for cross-methodology comparison.
      11              : 
      12              : class lliu_coverage extends uvm_subscriber #(axi4_stream_transaction);
      13            0 :     `uvm_component_utils(lliu_coverage)
      14              : 
      15              :     // ── Bin counters ────────────────────────────────────────────────
      16              :     // Message type
      17              :     int msg_type_add_order;   // 'A' = 0x41
      18              :     int msg_type_other;
      19              : 
      20              :     // Price range bins
      21              :     int price_penny;    // 1–99
      22              :     int price_dollar;   // 100–9999
      23              :     int price_large;    // 10000+
      24              : 
      25              :     // Side bins
      26              :     int side_buy;       // 'B'
      27              :     int side_sell;      // 'S'
      28              : 
      29              :     // Cross: price_range × side  (3 × 2 = 6 bins)
      30              :     int cross_penny_buy,  cross_penny_sell;
      31              :     int cross_dollar_buy, cross_dollar_sell;
      32              :     int cross_large_buy,  cross_large_sell;
      33              : 
      34              :     // Totals
      35              :     int total_sampled;
      36              : 
      37            6 :     function new(string name = "lliu_coverage", uvm_component parent = null);
      38            6 :         super.new(name, parent);
      39              :     endfunction
      40              : 
      41            6 :     function void build_phase(uvm_phase phase);
      42            6 :         super.build_phase(phase);
      43            6 :         msg_type_add_order = 0;
      44            6 :         msg_type_other     = 0;
      45            6 :         price_penny  = 0;
      46            6 :         price_dollar = 0;
      47            6 :         price_large  = 0;
      48            6 :         side_buy  = 0;
      49            6 :         side_sell = 0;
      50            6 :         cross_penny_buy  = 0;  cross_penny_sell  = 0;
      51            6 :         cross_dollar_buy = 0;  cross_dollar_sell  = 0;
      52            6 :         cross_large_buy  = 0;  cross_large_sell   = 0;
      53            6 :         total_sampled    = 0;
      54              :     endfunction
      55              : 
      56              :     // ── Analysis port write callback ────────────────────────────────
      57          733 :     function void write(axi4_stream_transaction t);
      58          733 :         byte unsigned msg_bytes[];
      59          733 :         int byte_count;
      60          733 :         byte unsigned msg_type;
      61          733 :         int unsigned price;
      62          733 :         int side;
      63              : 
      64              :         // Convert AXI4-Stream beats to raw byte array (big-endian)
      65          733 :         byte_count = t.tdata.size() * 8;
      66          733 :         msg_bytes = new[byte_count];
      67         3517 :         foreach (t.tdata[i])
      68        28136 :             for (int b = 0; b < 8; b++)
      69        28136 :                 msg_bytes[i*8 + b] = t.tdata[i][63 - b*8 -: 8];
      70              : 
      71              :         // Need at least 3 bytes (2-byte length + 1-byte type)
      72          733 :         if (byte_count < 3) return;
      73              : 
      74          733 :         total_sampled++;
      75          733 :         msg_type = msg_bytes[2];
      76              : 
      77              :         // ── Message type coverage ───────────────────────────────
      78          642 :         if (msg_type == 8'h41) begin
      79          642 :             msg_type_add_order++;
      80            0 :         end else begin
      81            0 :             msg_type_other++;
      82            0 :             return;  // no further field coverage for non-Add-Order
      83              :         end
      84              : 
      85              :         // ── Parse Add Order fields ──────────────────────────────
      86              :         // Need 38 bytes minimum for a full Add Order with length prefix
      87          640 :         if (byte_count < 38) return;
      88              : 
      89              :         // Side at offset 21 ('B' = buy, 'S' = sell)
      90          733 :         side = (msg_bytes[21] == 8'h42) ? 1 : 0;
      91              : 
      92              :         // Price at offset 34..37 (big-endian 32-bit)
      93          733 :         price = 0;
      94         2560 :         for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
      95         2560 :             price = (price << 8) | msg_bytes[34 + i];
      96              : 
      97              :         // ── Side coverage ───────────────────────────────────────
      98          333 :         if (side == 1) side_buy++;
      99          333 :         else           side_sell++;
     100              : 
     101              :         // ── Price range coverage ────────────────────────────────
     102          640 :         if (price >= 1 && price <= 99) begin
     103            0 :             price_penny++;
     104            0 :             if (side == 1) cross_penny_buy++;
     105            0 :             else           cross_penny_sell++;
     106          605 :         end else if (price >= 100 && price <= 9999) begin
     107           35 :             price_dollar++;
     108           20 :             if (side == 1) cross_dollar_buy++;
     109           15 :             else           cross_dollar_sell++;
     110          605 :         end else if (price >= 10000) begin
     111          605 :             price_large++;
     112          318 :             if (side == 1) cross_large_buy++;
     113          318 :             else           cross_large_sell++;
     114              :         end
     115              :     endfunction
     116              : 
     117              :     // ── Coverage query ──────────────────────────────────────────────
     118           12 :     function int get_cross_bins_hit();
     119           12 :         int hit = 0;
     120           12 :         if (cross_penny_buy   > 0) hit++;
     121           12 :         if (cross_penny_sell  > 0) hit++;
     122            6 :         if (cross_dollar_buy  > 0) hit++;
     123            8 :         if (cross_dollar_sell > 0) hit++;
     124            8 :         if (cross_large_buy   > 0) hit++;
     125            8 :         if (cross_large_sell  > 0) hit++;
     126           12 :         return hit;
     127              :     endfunction
     128              : 
     129            6 :     function real get_cross_coverage_pct();
     130            6 :         return (get_cross_bins_hit() * 100.0) / 6.0;
     131              :     endfunction
     132              : 
     133              :     // ── Report ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     134            6 :     function void report_phase(uvm_phase phase);
     135            6 :         string report;
     136            6 :         int cross_hit;
     137              : 
     138            6 :         super.report_phase(phase);
     139              : 
     140            6 :         cross_hit = get_cross_bins_hit();
     141              : 
     142            6 :         report = "\n";
     143            6 :         report = {report, "╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\n"};
     144            6 :         report = {report, "║         UVM Functional Coverage Report          ║\n"};
     145            6 :         report = {report, "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════╣\n"};
     146            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║  Total transactions sampled:  %6d            ║\n", total_sampled)};
     147            6 :         report = {report, "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════╣\n"};
     148            6 :         report = {report, "║  Message Type                                   ║\n"};
     149            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Add Order (A):    %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     150            6 :                   msg_type_add_order, msg_type_add_order > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     151            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Other:            %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     152            6 :                   msg_type_other, msg_type_other > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     153            6 :         report = {report, "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════╣\n"};
     154            6 :         report = {report, "║  Price Range                                    ║\n"};
     155            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Penny   (1-99):   %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     156            6 :                   price_penny, price_penny > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     157            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Dollar  (100-9k): %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     158            6 :                   price_dollar, price_dollar > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     159            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Large   (10k+):   %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     160            6 :                   price_large, price_large > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     161            6 :         report = {report, "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════╣\n"};
     162            6 :         report = {report, "║  Side                                           ║\n"};
     163            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Buy  (B):         %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     164            6 :                   side_buy, side_buy > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     165            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Sell (S):         %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     166            6 :                   side_sell, side_sell > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     167            6 :         report = {report, "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════╣\n"};
     168            6 :         report = {report, "║  Cross: Price Range × Side                      ║\n"};
     169            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Penny  × Buy:     %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     170            6 :                   cross_penny_buy, cross_penny_buy > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     171            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Penny  × Sell:    %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     172            6 :                   cross_penny_sell, cross_penny_sell > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     173            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Dollar × Buy:     %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     174            6 :                   cross_dollar_buy, cross_dollar_buy > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     175            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Dollar × Sell:    %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     176            6 :                   cross_dollar_sell, cross_dollar_sell > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     177            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Large  × Buy:     %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     178            6 :                   cross_large_buy, cross_large_buy > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     179            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║    Large  × Sell:    %6d  %s                 ║\n",
     180            6 :                   cross_large_sell, cross_large_sell > 0 ? "[hit]" : "[   ]")};
     181            6 :         report = {report, "╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════╣\n"};
     182            6 :         report = {report, $sformatf("║  Cross coverage: %0d/6 bins = %0.1f%%             ║\n",
     183            6 :                   cross_hit, get_cross_coverage_pct())};
     184            6 :         report = {report, "╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\n"};
     185              : 
     186            6 :         `uvm_info("COVERAGE", report, UVM_LOW)
     187              :     endfunction
     188              : endclass
